title: France cruise into semi-finals - could this be the best Les Bleus ever?
summary: France advances to the semi-finals after defeating Morocco, showcasing the squad that could be one of their strongest ever. As two-time World Cup winners (1998, 2018), Les Bleus are positioned as favorites for the 2026 competition.
content: World Cup winners in 1998 and 2018, France have created another special team and in beating Morocco showed why they are favourites to win the 2026 competition.

zh.title: 法国顺利晋级半决赛——这会是历史最强的法国队吗？
zh.summary: 法国在击败摩洛哥后成功晋级半决赛，展现出可能是历史上最强的阵容。作为两次世界杯冠军（1998年、2018年），法国队被定位为2026年竞赛的热门球队。

title: What's going on with penalties - is it time to end the 'stutter'?
summary: Kylian Mbappe's penalty miss in France's victory over Morocco exemplifies an emerging issue in modern football: players failing after using stutter steps in their approach. The trend raises questions about whether rule changes should address this coaching tactic.
content: Kylian Mbappe's penalty miss in France's win against Morocco is the latest example of a player missing a penalty after stuttering in the run-up.

zh.title: 点球怎么了——是时候结束"停顿"了吗？
zh.summary: 基利安·姆巴佩在法国战胜摩洛哥的比赛中的点球失手，体现了现代足球中出现的一个问题：球员在助跑中使用停顿步伐后失手。这一趋势引发了一个问题，即规则改变是否应该应对这种教练战术。
